title: Hartenbos Property Group - A journey built on trust, community and local heart
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Winning Best Estate Agent in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Winning Best Estate Agent in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards is a milestone we are truly honoured to celebrate.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Winning Best Estate Agent in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards is a milestone we are truly honoured to celebrate."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This recognition is not only a reflection of the hard work and dedication of our team, but also a heartfelt tribute to the people of Mossel Bay and Hartenbos who have placed their trust in us.","html":"This recognition is not only a reflection of the hard work and dedication of our team, but also a heartfelt tribute to the people of Mossel Bay and Hartenbos who have placed their trust in us."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"At the centre of every success story we’ve achieved, stands our community, and for that, we are deeply grateful."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our journey to this award","html":"Our journey to this award"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hartenbos Property Group was founded by Bobby van Schalkwyk, who brings over 33 years of real estate experience. From day one, our vision has been clear: to deliver a property service that goes beyond transactions, one built on relationships, integrity, and local expertise.","html":"Hartenbos Property Group was founded by Bobby van Schalkwyk, who brings over 33 years of real estate experience. From day one, our vision has been clear: to deliver a property service that goes beyond transactions, one built on relationships, integrity, and local expertise."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Over the years, we have grown into a market leader in the Hartenbos and Mossel Bay region, playing a role in the sale of some of the most sought-after properties in the area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But our journey has never been about numbers alone. It has been about people and their stories - families finding their forever homes, retirees settling into their dream coastal lifestyle, or investors placing their trust in us to guide their decisions.","html":"But our journey has never been about numbers alone. It has been about people and their stories - families finding their forever homes, retirees settling into their dream coastal lifestyle, or investors placing their trust in us to guide their decisions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This award is proof that our mission of serving people first has made a real impact.","html":"This award is proof that our mission of serving people first has made a real impact."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The role of our values","html":"The role of our values"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our success rests firmly on three values: trust, results, and community. Trust is at the very heart of what we do.","html":"Our success rests firmly on three values: trust, results, and community. Trust is at the very heart of what we do."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When clients invite us into one of the biggest decisions of their lives, they need to know they are in safe, experienced hands. We’ve built our reputation on transparency, honesty and guidance, which always prioritises the client’s best interests.","html":"When clients invite us into one of the biggest decisions of their lives, they need to know they are in safe, experienced hands. We’ve built our reputation on transparency, honesty and guidance, which always prioritises the client’s best interests."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Results are equally important. We’re proud of the fact that we’ve been instrumental in major property transactions in Mossel Bay, while also guiding countless everyday sales with the same commitment.","html":"Results are equally important. We’re proud of the fact that we’ve been instrumental in major property transactions in Mossel Bay, while also guiding countless everyday sales with the same commitment."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Each property - big or small - matters to us because it matters to our clients."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Finally, community is the heartbeat of our business. Our agents live here, raise their families here, and are active in everything from business forums to sporting events.","html":"Finally, community is the heartbeat of our business. Our agents live here, raise their families here, and are active in everything from business forums to sporting events."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Some of our team members are Comrades and Ironman athletes, which connects us not only to the local sporting world but to a wider national network. This deep community involvement ensures we understand the lifestyle, opportunities, and dreams that make Mossel Bay unique.","html":"Some of our team members are Comrades and Ironman athletes, which connects us not only to the local sporting world but to a wider national network. This deep community involvement ensures we understand the lifestyle, opportunities, and dreams that make Mossel Bay unique."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Inspiration","html":"Inspiration "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our inspiration comes directly from the people of Mossel Bay and Hartenbos. The resilience, warmth, and generosity of this community drive us to raise our standards every day.","html":"Our inspiration comes directly from the people of Mossel Bay and Hartenbos. The resilience, warmth, and generosity of this community drive us to raise our standards every day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether it’s a young couple buying their first home, or a family entrusting us with a property they’ve loved for years, their journeys inspire us to do more and be better.","html":"Whether it’s a young couple buying their first home, or a family entrusting us with a property they’ve loved for years, their journeys inspire us to do more and be better."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our valued team","html":"Our valued team"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Behind every successful sale and every satisfied client stands our dedicated team.","html":"Behind every successful sale and every satisfied client stands our dedicated team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Each agent is handpicked for their knowledge of the local market, their ability to read property trends, and their genuine passion for serving people.","html":"Each agent is handpicked for their knowledge of the local market, their ability to read property trends, and their genuine passion for serving people."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We have invested in training with top South African sales coaches and attorneys to ensure that our team delivers world-class service. But beyond skills, what truly sets them apart is their heart."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They treat every client like a neighbour - because in our community, that’s exactly who they are.","html":"They treat every client like a neighbour - because in our community, that’s exactly who they are."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To our team: thank you. Your hard work, your commitment, and your belief in what we do together have brought us to this moment.","html":"To our team: thank you. Your hard work, your commitment, and your belief in what we do together have brought us to this moment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our community","html":"Our community "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Most importantly, to the people of Mossel Bay and Hartenbos: thank you. This award belongs to you. You have trusted us with your homes, your investments, and your dreams, and that trust is the greatest recognition we could ever receive.","html":"Most importantly, to the people of Mossel Bay and Hartenbos: thank you. This award belongs to you. You have trusted us with your homes, your investments, and your dreams, and that trust is the greatest recognition we could ever receive."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your votes in the Best of Mossel Bay Awards remind us why we do what we do and inspire us to keep delivering at the highest standard.","html":"Your votes in the Best of Mossel Bay Awards remind us why we do what we do and inspire us to keep delivering at the highest standard."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At Hartenbos Property Group, you are not just clients - you are our partners, our neighbours, and the reason we love what we do.","html":"At Hartenbos Property Group, you are not just clients - you are our partners, our neighbours, and the reason we love what we do."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As we look to the future, our promise is simple: to continue providing a seamless, personalised property experience that always puts your needs, your goals, and your peace of mind first."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To everyone who supported us, voted for us, and believed in us - thank you for making Hartenbos Property Group the Best Estate Agent in Mossel Bay.","html":"To everyone who supported us, voted for us, and believed in us - thank you for making Hartenbos Property Group the Best Estate Agent in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Together, we will keep building a community where dreams find their address.","html":"Together, we will keep building a community where dreams find their address."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Contact us","html":"Contact us"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shop 1 & 2, Diaz Convenience Market, Diaz, Mossel Bay","html":"Shop 1 & 2, Diaz Convenience Market, Diaz, Mossel Bay"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"044 692 0472 / 083 305 6940","html":"044 692 0472 / 083 305 6940"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Visit our website here.","html":"Visit our website here."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Hartenbos Property Group - A journey built on trust, community and local heart
